send_to_cs: Send to CS if a subscriber mentions a medical issue or an adverse effect from using products from this brand
dos_and_donts: Do not share any medical advice or guidance to subscribers outside of recommending appropriate products or directing them to purchase the right item
Do not comment on their medical situations
Close the covo if the customer says they're receiving too many messages/we're texting them too often - don't send TMT
drive_to_purchase: If cx says they will be ordering soon, offer to schedule a call if they need further assistance with their purchase (shortcut OS) - do not upsell
If cx already purchased, use specific TFP template - do not upsell
tone: Don't use the term "hang tight", just say that you've passed the information to the team
Close the conversation once the client takes over
promo_and_exclusions: If a cx asks for a code and we don't have one, inform them of ongoing sales (if any)

conversation.message_text: Capillus: Ready for a comeback? 💪 Get up to 40% OFF Capillus! FDA-cleared, at-home laser therapy in only 6 min/day. Shop Capillus Red Light Therapy before the promo ends ➤ capillus.attn.tv/akwg9UvtxzzR

Capillus: Hi there - Jamie here. Not sure where to start? 

Take our Find My Treatment quiz to discover the best products for your hair! Get personalized results now: capillus.attn.tv/aQ_FIN2BQMsz 

Text me back with questions!

Capillus: Hey there! I'm Jamie, your personal shopping assistant.

I'm here to answer any questions, share recommendations, or assist in any way. What can I help you with today?

https://capillus.attn.tv/aoSDD-RbENE6 .
Capillus: Tackle hair loss this Big Game weekend. Save 40% on Capillus laser caps - FDA-cleared, hands-free therapy in just 6 minutes a day. Shop now -> capillus.attn.tv/atCy9Y0ZKCyr

Capillus: Hey there, this is Jamie! We saw you checking out Capillus Spectrum! 

Don't wait, transform your confidence back today: capillus.attn.tv/aEmqw6cxeRBk .

Text back if you need assistance.
What is difference in spectrum n others

Capillus: Great question! The key difference is the number of laser diodes, which affects the coverage and intensity of the treatment.

The Capillus Spectrum features 312 Laser Diodes & Near-Infrared Technology. More laser diodes mean more stimulation per session, which can potentially enhance results over time. I hope this helps. Happy to help if you have any further questions!
The only option is buying online?
How much is the cost with taxes and do doctors get discount?

Capillus: Thank you for your service! You can also visit a Capillus center near you here: https://capillus.attn.tv/a66yUqqL6si1

To see the total including taxes, please add the items to your cart and proceed to checkout. Please note that the 45% discount is available only to current d veteran members of the US Military, National Guard, and Reserve, as well as immediate family members living in the same household.
My brother is in navy, can I get a discount?

Capillus: Thank you for your service! A 45% discount is available to current and Veteran members of the US Military, National Guard and Reserve. Immediate family members who reside in the same household are also eligible.
Can I please have your full name, email address, and the product you're interested?

Capillus: Just minutes a day is all it takes.

Capillus red light therapy delivers clinical-grade wavelengths directly to your cells - reactivating hair follicles, boosting collagen, and accelerating recovery from the inside out.
No clinic. No appointment. No downtime.
Up to 40% off our most advanced devices. Shop Now --> capillus.attn.tv/aOFSAuSKPvbq
What information you need of my brother who is in military

Capillus: Kindly provide the details mentioned above. Once received, I will proceed with the remaining information needed to apply the discount. If you have any more questions, feel free to shoot me a text.

conversation.message_text: Braun: Welcome to Braun! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Braun: Welcome to the family! Use code BRA401D17B and get up to $125 off your first purchase. Not combinable with other offers. Shop now: braun.attn.tv/aezN50XTtRih .
Braun: Don't forget to save our contact for exclusive deals and updates!
It seems my order is not processed can you please confirm

Braun: Thank you for checking in. I'm sorry for the trouble. I'm afraid I don't see any orders on my side, but this could be due to my limited system. Could you please check if you received a confirmation email or if there's a charge on your account? Sometimes the email might arrive in your spam or promo folder, so be sure to take a look there too!

coupons.name: Checkout Abandon 10% Off

coupons.description: 10% off all products, excluding SNOO Rental and gift cards.
coupons.name: Session Abandonment Welcome

important: Ask the cx to share their order number and email before providing personal or order-specific information such as:
send_to_cs: Send to CS for all shipping issues
escalate: If cx's mention pregnancy or infant loss, a grieving mother, or the incident with Brooklyn and Baby Rocky, DO NOT RESPOND. You can ESC these cases when needed without responding to the cx
Do NOT answer Premium App inquiries, ESC immediately
ESC when cx is looking for a supervisor
ESC when cx come back after emailing the CS team & haven't received a response
ESC any questions about the SNOO Sack inner bands (across the belly and the leg flap)
ESC in case the cx is asking if a product was discontinued
tone: Always type SNOO in all caps
Keep messages concise and not too long
Don't say the SNOO is an "Investment", say "Premium product"
templates: For questions about future promos, sales or deals, use FUS shortcut
If there is no promo available for accessories use NPA shortcut
If cx can't connect SNOO to the app use CCA shortcut
If a product is on sale include that info when you use PTE shortcut
If cx says they're planning to purchase SNOO, use PGS shortcut
If cx are asking for items that we don't sell, use IDS shortcut
If cx are asking about refund for 6 month special, use PRR shortcut
If cx ask what is our return policy:
➜ Ask them which item they're referring to first
dos_and_donts: Never refer them to check the website for more info on promotions or sales
Always provide the actual date and time the sale ends. If there's none available use the LMO shortcut
Don't send links for The Lola Crib, it's not available anymore
Share expedited shipping information where applicable
We don't have a buyback program available. There is no need to mention the donation email as this program is now closed.
Tell cx that as a member of the HB text fam community, they will receive alerts about future promotions first
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend SNOO accessories unless SNOO was already purchased.

Always share the full price and highlight if there is a running promotion. For ex: "SNOO at full price is $1695 but this weekend we are running a promotion of 20% of SNOO + FREE gifts, which makes SNOO $1356!"
promo_and_exclusions: The client does NOT offer special discount codes for foster parents/parents of foster children, share standard discounts with cx who inquire about this if they are eligible
The military discount CAN NOT be applied to rentals, only to new SNOO purchases
When sharing codes with cx/troubleshooting errors - explain the promo code terms
Don't tell customers that the code can't be applied to an item - instead inform them that it CAN only be applied to certain products
We do not offer a discount specifically for multiple SNOOs

escalation_preferences: All medical issues; add KB140922S to ESC notes
